text.p: Thanks for your help in securing my daughter , a place at University . At least she will feel good studying PR in the same university as her brother. The two are the last of my burden.Thanks a lot. The response to the article you submitted to was positive except for a few things which I could deal with on my own. However, I charge individuals whose papers have been accepted. The charge is based on the number of pages. You don’t need to worry as I will cover your own expenses. If you do need the letter of acceptance, please let me know so that I can send it to you

Thanks for your mail. First, about the position in my department, I 'm afraid it is too late now. We have shortlisted a British and a local for the position. I am happy that you are facing the challenges of being a very senior person at . My son, , is doing his first year in Estate Management in the University. The first boy will be graduating from University this June. I will look at your paper and advice accordingly.
Take care and all the best.
